description: PhantAuth Faker was a sample tenant of the PhantAuth random user generator and OpenID Connect testing service, backed by a Faker-based generator hosted on now.sh. Documentation references it as a tenant/example rather than a separate product.
summary: phantauth-faker.now.sh appears to expose a public HTTP random-user API surface with no documented developer authentication; the host itself now returns 404 and no separate GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found for this domain.

surfaces.name: PhantAuth Faker random user HTTP API
